name: JoAi: Create Private App

description.en: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.
description.de: Erstelle eine private Warp-App, die auf dein Team beschränkt ist, damit du private Warps unter deiner eigenen Marke veröffentlichen kannst.
description.es: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.
description.fr: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.
description.ro: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.
description.it: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.

bot: Use this when the user wants to set up a private warp brand for their team. Ask for the team slug, app name, and description.

description.en: A name for this private app
description.de: Ein Name für diese private App
description.es: A name for this private app
description.fr: A name for this private app
description.ro: A name for this private app
description.it: A name for this private app

inputs.bot: A short name for this private warp app or brand.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: What this private app is for
description.de: Wofür diese private App gedacht ist

description.it: What this private app is for
